name: chat
description: AI Chat Completion - LLM chat proxy via verging.ai. Supports GPT-4o and other models, streaming and non-streaming modes, token-based billing.
author: verging.ai

env.name: VERGING_API_KEY
env.description: verging.ai API Key - get from https://verging.ai (Login → Click avatar → API Keys)

env.name: VERGING_API_URL
env.description: verging.ai API URL (optional, defaults to https://verging.ai/api/v1)
